news.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
news.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

news.title: Kaspersky identifies malware framework targeting crypto investors
news.summary: Cybersecurity company Kaspersky said a newly identified malware framework is targeting cryptocurrency investors through social engineering tactics and trojanized GitHub apps.

news.title: 'WarshGPT': How Wall Street is adapting to the Fed's new era of communication
news.summary: Investment firms are readying for an era with less public commentary from the U.S. central bank. Some are relying on AI for an edge.

news.title: How are prediction markets taxed? The IRS hasn’t provided guidance yet
news.summary: Experts say the lack of federal guidance makes it's unclear on how prediction markets winnings should be reported and levied.

news.title: Will the Fed hike interest rates this month?
news.summary: Kevin Warsh’s testimony to Congress “offered some heat but not a lot of new light” on the outlook for interest rates, one economist said.

news.summary: Neil Rimer, the venture capitalist who co-founded Index Ventures, predicts the historic wealth AI is generating in Silicon Valley will have to be redistributed, voluntarily or involuntarily.

news.title: Meet Kimi K3, the newest Chinese AI model haunting Silicon Valley
news.summary: Moonshot AI’s new open model is catching up to Anthropic and OpenAI, raising questions about the future of the AI race.

news.title: Chinese AI has leveled up, and brought renewed focus on the open weight model shift
news.summary: It's the latest AI model from China to close the performance gap with leading U.S. AI labs.

news.title: Leather jacket worn by Nvidia CEO goes for just under $1 million at Sotheby's auction
news.summary: The high price for the garment is a sign that collectors are looking to bid on artifacts and collectibles from the artificial intelligence boom.

news.title: The White House is dictating access to frontier AI models, shifting power from tech giants, sources say
news.summary: The Trump administration is taking steps to control who gets access to the latest frontier models, people familiar with the matter told CNBC.

news.title: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs

news.summary: SpaceX's stock plunged further on Friday, a day after it aborted a test flight for its Starship rocket at the last second.

news.title: S&P 500 closes lower, Nasdaq falls more than 1% as chip stocks suffer: Live updates

news.title: There are only days left to get $1,200 from Raisin for opening a high-yield savings account or CD
news.summary: Savings marketplace Raisin is offering new customers up to $1,200 for opening a high-yield savings account or CD.

news.title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
news.summary: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it's not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI's chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the company. OpenAI's response so far has been carefully hedged, and the timing couldn't be worse

news.title: Meta's latest move in the AI talent war — plus Cramer's 4 quick hits on the market

news.title: Senator Warren requests 2026 reporting for Trump’s crypto earnings after $1.4B disclosure
news.summary: With the Senate likely voting on a crypto bill within days, Elizabeth Warren asked for information on Donald Trump’s earnings between January and July ahead of a 2027 deadline.

news.title: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
news.summary: Patreon is strengthening its defenses against AI scraping by working with Cloudflare to block bots that train AI models on creators’ content without permission. The move marks a shift away from relying on websites using robots.txt alone to actively block unauthorized AI training.

news.title: Bitcoin price sags under $62.5K as Iran strikes add to US stocks pressure
news.summary: Bitcoin saw a key rejection at local highs before reversing lower, moving with stocks for a second day as US-Iran war downside took its toll.
